Evaluate your true LLM performance
# Evaluate your true LLM performance
Gain actionable insights on your model’s strengths and weaknesses, then use them to improve performance for market success. See how your model performs against task difficulty, technical domain, prompt structure, taxonomy type, and more—with recommendations for enhancement.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/664757691040731e0e0a77ea/668ff599eb2199b60af78ef2_LLM-Diagram%20\(1\).png)
Example model evaluation dashboard
Your risk-free model evaluation can include:
Accuracy & precision testing - Ensure your LLM delivers accurate and precise responses across various tasks.
Efficiency & scalability assessment - Evaluate your LLM’s processing speed and resource usage.
Robustness & reliability analysis - Assess your LLM’s resilience to diverse and challenging inputs.
Performance benchmarking - Compare your LLM’s performance against industry standards and competitor models.
User interaction & usability testing - Evaluate your LLM’s ease of use and effectiveness in real-world applications.
## Request your LLM evaluation today!
Request your risk-free LLM evaluation now

</script><script type="osano/blocked" async=""></script></head><body><div class="c-custom-code w-embed"><style>
  /* Font Smoothing */
  body { 
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  }

  /* Link Inherit */
  a {
    color: inherit;
  }

  /* Rich Text */
  .c-rich-content ul li::marker {
    color: var(--system--light--primary)
  }

  /* General */
  .c-hero_background-overlay {
  background: linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(2, 2, 4, 0.00) 0%, rgba(2, 2, 4, 0.30) 50%, rgba(2, 2, 4, 1) 100%, #020204 60%);
  }

  @media (max-width: 991px) { .c-hero_background-overlay {
    background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(2, 2, 4, 0.00) 0%, rgba(2, 2, 4, 0.90) 50%, #020204 100%);
    }
  }

  /* Container for the ordered list items to handle the spacing */
  ol {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
  }

  ol li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: top;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem; /* Optional: add some space between list items */
    margin-left: -1rem;
  }

  /* Circle containing the number */
  ol li::before {
    content: counter(item);
    counter-increment: item;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 1.5rem!important;
    height: 1.5rem!important;
    background: var(--system--light--primary-container);
    color: var(--system--light--primary);
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-right: 0.62rem;
    font-size: 1rem; /* Adjust the font size as needed */
    font-weight: 500;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 0.2rem;
    flex-grow: 0;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    flex-basis: auto;
    float: left;
    margin-left: -2rem;
  }

  [dark-mode] ol li::before { 
    background: var(--system--dark--primary-container);
    color: var(--system--dark--primary);
  }

  /* Initialize the counter */
  ol {
    counter-reset: item;
  }


  /* Component States */
  .c-slider_btn .c-icon {
    transition-property: transform;
    transition-duration: 375ms;
    transition-timing-function: ease;
  }

  .c-slider_btn.cc-left .c-icon {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }

  .c-slider_btn.cc-left:focus .c-icon {
    transform: translate(-0.25rem, 0px) rotate(180deg);
  }

  .c-slider_btn.cc-right:focus .c-icon {
    transform: translate(0.25rem, 0px);
  }

  /* Blog Card */
  .c-blog-card:hover .c-blog-card_content-wrapper {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  @media (min-width: 992px) {
    .cc-featured .c-blog-card:hover .c-blog-card_image-wrapper {
      height: 19.5rem;
    }

    .cc-featured .c-blog-card_image-wrapper {
      height: 25rem;
    }

    .c-blog-card:hover .c-blog-card_image-wrapper {
      height: 9.5rem;
    }
  }

  .c-blog-card:hover .c-blog-card_text-wrapper {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-blog-card_text-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  }

  .c-blog-card_text-wrapper > div {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .c-blog-card_text-wrapper p {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    line-clamp: 3;
    box-orient: vertical;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991px) {

    .c-blog-card_text-wrapper {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: 1fr;
    }

    .c-blog-card_content-wrapper {
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }

  }

  /* Info Card */
  .c-info-card:hover .c-info-card_text-wrapper {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-info-card_text-wrapper.active {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-info-card_text-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  }

  .c-info-card_text-wrapper > div {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991px) {
    .c-info-card_text-wrapper {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-rows: 1fr;
    }
  }	

  .c-info-card:hover .c-info-card_icon {
    color: var(--system--light--on-primary);
    background-color: var(--system--light--primary)
  }

  /* Speaker Card */
  [minus] {
    display: none;
  }

  .c-speaker-card:hover [plus] {
    display: none;
  }

  .c-speaker-card:hover [minus] {
    display: block;
  }

  .c-speaker-card:hover .c-speaker-card_text-wrapper {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-speaker-card_text-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  }

  .c-speaker-card_text-wrapper > div {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .c-speaker-card_text-wrapper p {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 10;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    line-clamp: 10;
    box-orient: vertical;
  }

  .c-speaker-card_text-wrapper p::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1); /* Adjust to match your background color */
    color: inherit;
    padding-left: 5px;
  }


  /* Component Variations */

  .secondary .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-3);
    color: var(--system--light--on-surface-subtle);
  }
  .secondary .c-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-4);
    color: var(--system--light--on-surface-subtle);
  }

  .third .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1);
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface);
  }

  .third .c-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [black-primary] .primary .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1);
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface);
  }

  [black-primary] .primary .c-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] [black-primary] .primary .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-3);
    color: var(--system--light--on-surface-subtle);
  }

  [dark-mode] [black-primary] .primary .c-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-4);
  }

  .section--intro .c-tag_title,
  .section--intro .c-block {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    align-items: center; 
    text-align: center;
  }

  .c-resource_main-wrapper p {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    line-clamp: 3;
    box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cc-centre_logo-section .c-logo-wall_wrapper {
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    grid-column-gap: 3rem;
    grid-row-gap: 1rem;
  }

  .cc-info-collapse--2 .c-info-card {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-2);
  }

  [dark-mode].cc-info-collapse--2 .c-info-card {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-2)!important;
  }

  @media (min-width: 992px) {
    .c-info-collapse--3_tab-main {
      display: none!important;
    }
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-main > div {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-item.cc-active .c-info-collapse--3_tab-main {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-item.cc-active .c-info-collapse--3_tab-text-wrapper {
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--system--light--on-surface);
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-item.cc-active [plus] {
    display: none;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--3_tab-item.cc-active [minus] {
    display: block;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--4_faq_item.cc-active [plus] {
    display: none;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--4_faq_item.cc-active [minus] {
    display: block;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--4_faq-main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 0fr;
  }

  .cc-active .c-info-collapse--4_faq-main {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  .c-info-collapse--4_faq-main > div {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1274px) {
    .c-text-2.cc-divider {
      display: none;
    }
  } 

  .c-testimonial--1_slider-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    display: flex!important;
    overflow: hidden;
    justify-content: space-between;
    grid-column-gap: 2rem;
    grid-row-gap: 2rem;
  }
  /* Dark Mode Variations */

  [dark-mode] {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface);
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-tag {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-primary-container);
    background-color: var(--system--dark--primary-container);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-block_logo {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }

  [dark-mode] .secondary .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-3);
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface-subtle);
  }

  [dark-mode] .secondary .c-button:hover {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] .third .c-button {
    background-color: var(--system--light--surface-1);
    color: var(--system--light--on-surface);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-blog-card_text-wrapper {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface-weak)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-info-card_text-wrapper {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface-weak)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-info-card {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-info-card_tag {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface-weak)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-link {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-primary-container)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-info-card_icon {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-primary-container);
    background-color: var(--system--dark--primary-container);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-info-card:hover .c-info-card_icon {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-primary);
    background-color: var(--system--dark--primary)
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-checkmark_item-icon {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--primary-container);
    color: var(--system--dark--on-primary-container);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-checkmark_box {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--primary-container);
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-wall--logo {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-hero--3-stats-line {
    background-color: var(--system-dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode].c-hero,
  [dark-mode].c-hero--7_top-wrapper {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-1);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-block p {

  }

  [dark-mode] .c-hero--3_stats-line {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-resource_featured-slider-text-wrapper {
    color: var(--system--dark--on-surface-weak);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-slider_btn {
    background-color: transparent;
    border-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-slider_progress-bar {

  }

  [dark-mode] .c-profile_logo {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-profile_logo-wrapper {
    border-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-testimonial--1_stats-line {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-4);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-testimonial--2_wrapper {
    background-color: var(--system--dark--surface-2);
  }

  [dark-mode] .c-stats-block_item-wrapper {

  }

  [dark-mode] .c-stats-block_item-box {

  }

  [dark-mode] .c-stats-display--2_item {
